title: Guns N Stuff
description:
With up to four players, choose to battle each other in free for all with a variety of weapons ranging from a simple pistol to a sumo suit! Not a fan of beating your friends? Battle alongside or alone against waves of different zombies constantly getting stronger.

- Single Player / Local Multiplayer up to 4 players
- 2+ players recommended
- Use of steam remote play recommended

- 2+ players required
- Modifiers to adjust stats such as health and weapon drop rates
- Custom Win Messages
- 21 Maps

- 1-4 players
- 3 different maps
- Progressively stronger zombies as well as bosses and types of zombies
- Perks and weapon cannon
description_short: A top down shared screen local multiplayer game allowing for battles between you and your friends as well as co-op game play against waves of endless zombies.
